summary: Hotz rails against the pervasive use of AI and psychological manipulation by tech platforms to extract maximum value from users. He argues that apps like Hinge, Uber, and payment systems have become exploitative middlemen that use sophisticated algorithms to keep people 'perpetually on the edge.' The post contends that market forces won't fix this because companies preemptively optimize to prevent user exodus, and democracy can't help because the algorithms control too much. He sees no path to reform, only revolution—possibly requiring financial collapse or war to break the cycle of manipulation that he calls 'wireheading' and feeding customers to Moloch.
key_points: Tech platforms use AI and psychology to extract maximum value through manipulation (boosts, tip screens, dynamic pricing)
Market self-correction is impossible because companies monitor and preempt user backlash with their dashboards
Opting out creates a collective action problem—competitive businesses must maximize engagement or die
Democratic reform is futile because algorithms have decoupled user actions from outcomes
The system will only change through catastrophic collapse, not gradual reform
money_quotes: How does someone who works on this wake up every morning and feel okay about themselves?
Oh, there's a middle man now. An evil ominous middleman using state of the art AI algorithms to extract just a little bit more from you.
Quick Jeeves, tune the AI to make people feel less manipulated.
Every metric is now a target. You better maximize engagement or you will lose engagement this is a red queen's race we can't afford to lose!
Burn all the social capital, burn all your values, FEED IT ALL TO MOLOCH!
Your vote is as decoupled from action as the amount Uber pays the driver is decoupled from the fare that you pay.
There's no reform here, there's only revolution.
Using big data, machine learning, and psychology to manipulate others at scale is not okay.
key_insight: Modern tech capitalism has created an inescapable system of algorithmic manipulation that can only end through catastrophic collapse, not reform.
